events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario. It describes field review of transformers dry-type & pad-mount. Expected unit in intended location, nameplates and orientation marks readable, housing and adjacent work no damage, matches referenced detail for rough-complete stage. References NEC Art. 450, 250.30. Need identify component/material/condition. The condition seems acceptable. Decision likely pass. Risk low. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions none flagged -> empty list. Percent complete maybe 80? Rough-complete stage. Value 0. Sound_source empty? Schema says component or source of sound when asked; not asked, maybe empty string. Confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. Findings: no defects observed; unit installed per detail. Actions: none; continue to testing/inspection/closeout. Rationale: observed unit matches drawings/specs, nameplate legible, no damage, proper orientation, consistent with NEC Art. 450 and 250.30 for grounding/bonding/installation. References: NEC Art. 450, NEC 250.30. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
